title: Bunica Cappuccina (brainrot italian)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Fetelor! Un copil din satul vecin a ajuns viral cu o balerină din cești de cafea. Inteligență artificială, zice. Stați să vă arăt.
shots.image_prompt: standing in a cozy rustic village kitchen holding a small steaming white cup of coffee, gesturing at the camera with mock outrage and a playful smile, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she gestures with the little coffee cup and rolls her eyes playfully at the camera, animated but coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Tralala, balerina, prostii. Asta-i cafea adevărată, la ibric.
shots.image_prompt: close-up of a traditional copper coffee pot bubbling over a small blue gas flame on a rustic stove, rich coffee foam rising to the rim, warm light
shots.motion_prompt: the coffee in the copper pot bubbles up and the foam rises toward the rim, gentle steam, slow satisfying coherent motion
shots.sfx: coffee bubbling and softly hissing in a small pot on a stove

shots.line: De azi sunt și eu influenceriță internațională. Spuneți-mi... Bunica Cappuccina!
shots.image_prompt: striking a dramatic proud pose with one hand on her hip and the other holding the small white coffee cup aloft like a trophy, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she strikes a dramatic proud pose and lifts the cup like a trophy, playful confident motion, stable framing

shots.voiceover: Eu nu dansez balet. Eu dansez hora. Cu cana în mână.
shots.image_prompt: the same small white coffee cup spinning slowly on a rustic wooden table like a tiny dancer, warm golden light, shallow depth of field
shots.motion_prompt: the small white coffee cup slowly spins in place on the wooden table, a little coffee swirling inside, whimsical slow coherent motion

sfx.prompt: a ceramic cup softly scraping and spinning on a wooden table

shots.line: Băiatul ăla a folosit inteligență artificială. Eu folosesc inteligență... naturală.
shots.image_prompt: tapping her temple with one finger and giving a sly wink to the camera, holding the small white coffee cup in the other hand, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she taps her temple with one finger and gives a slow knowing wink to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Un strop de lapte de la vaca Florica. Așa se face un cappuccino la țară.
shots.image_prompt: a stream of fresh milk being poured into the same small white cup of dark coffee, swirling into soft foam, extreme close-up, warm golden light
shots.motion_prompt: milk pours into the dark coffee and swirls into a soft foam, gentle slow appetizing coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: milk being poured into a cup of coffee, soft liquid pouring

shots.line: Băiete, dacă mă vezi: bravo ție. Dar la mine găsești și gust, nu doar like-uri.
shots.image_prompt: raising the small white coffee cup toward the camera in a friendly warm toast with a grin, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she raises the cup toward the camera in a warm toast and smiles, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Bunica Cappuccina, episodul unu. Dați like, că urmează... Bunica Espresso! Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: blowing a kiss to the camera while holding the small white coffee cup, big warm smile, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she blows a kiss to the camera and waves, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
